items.title: Over Iran, U.S. and Israeli Aircraft Fly as Equals
items.description: Israel has emerged as the Middle East’s preeminent military power just as the U.S. seeks to reduce its permanent footprint in the region.

items.title: The Epstein Panic
items.description: There’s a reason that it is not the usual practice of the DOJ to release unverified, disparaging information about people it’s not charging with crime...

items.title: The New Machine Gets Its Spoils
items.description: Zohran Mamdani’s choice for a key foreign policy position in his administration shows the power of a progressive Tammany Hall.

items.title: No, Mr. President, Section 122 Tariffs Won’t Work Either
items.description: Despite Donald Trump’s claims, history shows that Section 122 does not justify his new tariffs.

items.title: From Trump’s Warp Speed to the FDA’s Warp Stall
items.description: The FDA talks a big game on deregulation, but it’s not paired with real action.
